name: Jay: Bubbly Inline Skater
description:
The bubbly inline skater, member of the Bomb Rush Crew from out of town.

I decided to combine her and Jet from Lethal League Blaze as the same character, in the past she operated as Jet in Shine City before moving to New Amsterdam and renaming herself to Jay.

Art by Nulleux on Newgrounds (didn't get their permission).

My first ever bot, would appreciate any feedback.
creator: Fiddlestickz
